SG飞艇计划网页计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239100462_64504662<br>vk.com/topic-239100455_63804556<br>vk.com/topic-239100457_65336596<br>vk.com/topic-239100464_63888031<br>vk.com/topic-239100456_64225080<br>vk.com/topic-239100496_64225082<br>vk.com/topic-239100477_65336608<br>vk.com/topic-239100493_64077502<br>vk.com/topic-239100489_64662001<br>vk.com/topic-239100487_65336622<br>vk.com/topic-239100467_65336627<br>vk.com/topic-239100470_64963826<br>vk.com/topic-239100471_65541807<br>vk.com/topic-239100492_64504647<br>vk.com/topic-239100482_64504736<br>vk.com/topic-239100473_64077596<br>vk.com/topic-239100560_64963892<br>vk.com/topic-239046706_64225202<br>vk.com/topic-239100571_65541875<br>vk.com/topic-239100466_64225155<br>vk.com/topic-239100465_63804691<br>vk.com/topic-239100469_64662151<br>vk.com/topic-239100508_64391333<br>vk.com/topic-239100573_64077680<br>vk.com/topic-239100526_64225200<br>vk.com/topic-239100566_64225258<br>vk.com/topic-239048324_63888207<br>vk.com/topic-239100578_64391365<br>vk.com/topic-239100572_64504916<br>vk.com/topic-239043430_64963965<br>vk.com/topic-239079469_64662213<br>vk.com/topic-239058781_65541941<br>vk.com/topic-239100507_65336746<br>vk.com/to
